title: Design a Greeting Card
description: An interactive birthday greeting card built with CSS pseudo-classes and pseudo-elements. The card uses ::before and ::after to inject emoji decorations around the heading, :hover to scale and recolor the card, and :target to show hidden sections only when their anchor links are clicked.
objectives: Use ::before and ::after to inject content without touching the HTML
Apply :hover to trigger visual transitions on a card element
Use :target to show and hide sections based on URL fragment
Style anchor link states: hover, active, focus, and visited
Combine transition with transform for smooth hover animations

files.name: index.html
files.content:
